headline: Dow Jones Futures: Nasdaq Set To Reclaim Key Level; Apple, SpaceX, Sandisk, Robinhood In Focus
summary: Dow Jones futures edged lower Monday morning, while S&P 500 futures and especially Nasdaq futures rose.  Apple, SpaceX, Sandisk and Robinhood Markets are notable stocks to watch.  Last week, the major indexes had solid gains, but while the Dow Jones ended at record highs, the Nasdaq fell back below key support as AI stocks were hammered.

headline: How Trump Accounts can turn $2K into $40K: Robinhood CEO & BNY CEO discuss
summary: Trump Accounts, the government-sponsored savings accounts for children, have officially launched. Bank of New York Mellon (BNY) CEO Robin Vince and Robinhood (HOOD) CEO Vlad Tenev sit down with Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Jennifer Schonberger to discuss the philosophy and benefits of the Trump Accounts program. Go to TrumpAccounts.gov or download the Trump Accounts mobile app to get your child's account started.

content.title: How Trump Accounts can turn $2K into $40K: Robinhood CEO & BNY CEO discuss
content.description:
Trump Accounts, the government-sponsored savings accounts for children, have officially launched.

Bank of New York Mellon (BNY) CEO Robin Vince and Robinhood (HOOD) CEO Vlad Tenev sit down with Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Jennifer Schonberger to discuss the philosophy and benefits of the Trump Accounts program.

Go to TrumpAccounts.gov or download the Trump Accounts mobile app to get your child's account started.
content.summary: Trump Accounts, the government-sponsored savings accounts for children, have officially launched. Bank of New York Mellon (BNY) CEO Robin Vince and Robinhood (HOOD) CEO Vlad Tenev sit down with Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Jennifer Schonberger to discuss the philosophy and benefits of the Trump Accounts program. Go to TrumpAccounts.gov or download the Trump Accounts mobile app to get your child's account started.
